hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext:
This project has a graphify code graph at graphify-out/graph.json (2086 nodes, 4811 edges, 161 files). To LOCATE code, query the graph before running broad Glob/Grep sweeps:
  graphify explain "SymbolName"   - what a node is and its neighbors
  graphify path "A" "B"           - how two symbols connect
  graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md     - community hubs and entry points
The graph tells you WHICH files matter; then Read those files directly for exact current contents. Do not treat graph output as a substitute for reading a file you are about to edit.
